initialNotificationMessage.title: Review - {param.campaigndescription.get()}
initialNotificationMessage.content:
{image.header}


Hello {dataset.fullname.get()},


A review of the access rights is needed. This is a compulsory IT Security Process.


Please check the attached Excel spreadsheet and fulfill the reviewstatus and reviewcomment columns accordingly.


Please send back the excel spreadsheet to the security team for processing.

You can also connect to the Identity Analytics web portal to perform the review.


Your feedback is expected before {param.campaigndeadline.get().add('d',-7).toDateString()}.


Best Regards,


The Security Team

reminderMessage.title: Review Reminder - {param.campaigndescription.get()}
reminderMessage.content:
{image.header}


Hello {dataset.fullname.get()},


{$dataset.isdelegated.get()?"This task is delegated from "+dataset.delegatorfullname.get():""}


This is a gentle reminder for the review of the access rights {param.campaigndescription.get()} that is needed.

This is a compulsory IT Security Process.


Please connect to the RadiantLogic platform to do the review.


Your feedback is expected before {param.campaigndeadline.get().add('d',-7).toDateString()}.


Best Regards,


The Security Team

reasignementMessageMessage.title: Review - {param.campaigndescription.get()}
reasignementMessageMessage.content:
{image.header}


Hello {dataset.fullname.get()},


{$dataset.isdelegated.get()?"This task is delegated from "+dataset.delegatorfullname.get():""}


A review of the access rights has been reassigned to you and is needed. This is a compulsory IT Security Process.


Please check the attached Excel spreadsheet and fulfill the reviewstatus and reviewcomment columns accordingly.


Please send back the excel spreadsheet to the security team for processing.

You can also connect to the Identity Analytics web portal to perform the review.


Your feedback is expected before {param.campaigndeadline.get().add('d',-7).toDateString()}.


Best Regards,


The Security Team
